zh.lifeSummary: 當William Tilley於1607年出生在英國英格蘭倫敦米諾列斯時，他的父親William Tilley45歲，母親Alice Devenish32歲。他於1640年7月6日與Alice Frost在美國麻薩諸塞州巴恩斯塔波結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他於1635年移民到布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼。他去世於1670年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼波斯頓享年63歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Tilley于1607年出生在英国英格兰倫敦米諾列斯时，他的父亲William Tilley45岁，母亲Alice Devenish32岁。他于1640年7月6日与Alice Frost在美国马萨诸塞州巴恩斯塔波结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。他于1635年移民到布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼。他去世于1670年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼波斯頓享年63岁。

nameMeanings.name: Tilley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Tilly-sur-Seulles (Calvados) or Tilly (Eure), France.

English: habitational name from Tyley in Wotton under Edge (Gloucestershire), Tiley in Minterne Magna (Dorset), or Tilley (Shropshire). The Gloucestershire and Dorset placenames derive from Old English tigel ‘tile’ + lēah ‘wood, woodland clearing’. The Shropshire placename derives from an uncertain first element + Old English lēah.
English: occupational name from Middle English tilie ‘one who tills the land, a husbandman’. Compare Tiller .

variants.name: Tillie
meanings: English (northern England and southern Scotland): variant of   Tilley  . This form of the surname is rare in Britain and Ireland.

variants.name: Tiller
meanings: English (southern, especially Hampshire): occupational name from Middle English tiliere, tilyer ‘one who tills the soil, husbandman, farmer, farm laborer’. This is a derivative of Old English tilian ‘to till (the soil)’, Middle English tilie. There has been some confusion of this name with Tyler .

variants.name: Tiley
meanings: English (Gloucestershire, Somerset and Wiltshire): variant of   Tilley  .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Tilley was born in 1607, in Minories, London, England, United Kingdom, his father, William Tilley, was 45 and his mother, Alice Devenish, was 32. He married Alice Frost on 6 July 1640, in Barnstable, Massachusetts, United States. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. He immigrated to Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America in 1635. He died in 1670, in Boston, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Tilley est né en 1607, à Minories, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Tilley, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Alice Devenish, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Alice Frost le 6 juillet 1640, à Barnstable, Massachusetts, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Il a immigré au Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique en 1635. Il est décédé en 1670, à Boston, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 63 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Tilley 1607 in Minories, London, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Tilley 45 und seine Mutter Alice Devenish 32. Er hat am 6. Juli 1640 in Barnstable, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten Alice Frost geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Er ist 1635 nach Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America eingewandert. Er starb 1670 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Boston, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Tilley è nato il nel 1607 nel Minories, London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William Tilley, aveva 45 anni e il suo madre, Alice Devenish, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Alice Frost il 6 luglio 1640, nel Barnstable, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Immigrato nel Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America nel 1635. Morì nel 1670, nel Boston, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 63 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William Tilleyが1607年にイギリスイギリスロンドンミノーイスで生まれた時，父William Tilleyは45歳，母Alice Devenishは32歳であった。1640年7月6日にアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州バーンスタブルでAlice Frostと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼は1635年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーに移住した。彼は1670年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーボストンで63歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Tilley(이)가 1607년 영국 잉글랜드 런던 민리스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Tilley(은)는 45세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Devenish(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1640년 7월 6일 미국 매사추세츠 주 바른스타블일에서 Alice Frost(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1635년에 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이로 이민을 떠났다. 그는 1670년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 보스턴에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Tilley nasceu em 1607, em Minories, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Tilley, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Alice Devenish, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Frost em 6 de julho de 1640, em Barnstable, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ele imigrou para o Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America em 1635. Ele faleceu em 1670, em Boston, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 63 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Tilley родился в 1607 г. в местности минориесь, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Tilley было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Devenish, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Frost 6 июля 1640 г. в местности барнстабл, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Он иммигрировал в массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в 1635 году. Он умер в 1670 г. в местности бостон, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 63 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Tilley nació en 1607, en Minories, London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William Tilley, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Alice Devenish, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Alice Frost el 6 de julio de 1640, en Barnstable, Masachusets, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Inmigró a Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America en 1635. Murió en 1670, en Boston, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 63 años.
